svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 18px; margin-left: 450px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1f2328;
display: inline-block; font-size: 22px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1f2328, #cdd0d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: F28 · Transformer backward 推导查漏表

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(238, 244, 255), rgb(23, 28, 37)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(86, 128, 194), rgb(98, 134, 191));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 110px; margin-left: 21px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #27313d;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#27313d, #bcc5cf); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
1. 完整梯度
SGD needs ∇θL, not one derivative

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(238, 244, 255), rgb(23, 28, 37)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(86, 128, 194), rgb(98, 134, 191));

div.div:
2. 两遍算法
forward saves local slopes; backward carries Δ

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(238, 244, 255), rgb(23, 28, 37)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(86, 128, 194), rgb(98, 134, 191));

div.div:
3. 路径求和
shared value accumulates all downstream paths

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(234, 248, 238), rgb(18, 30, 22)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(78, 169, 107), rgb(55, 133, 80));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 240px; margin-left: 21px;

div.div:
4. Attention
ΔY → ΔV / ΔP → ΔS → ΔQ, ΔK

div.div:
5. LayerNorm
row-local projection; no batch mixing

div.div:
6. LoRA
freeze W0; update D and U only

7. Residual add
copy gradient to skip and branch; merge by addition

8. Audit habit
write dA first, then collect each variable coefficient
